info.title: Agrisiti Academy API
info.description: REST API for the Agrisiti Academy e-learning platform. Supports student registration, course management, progress tracking, tests, assignments, notes, messaging, community forum, and notifications.

get.summary: List assignments for a course with the user's submission status
Get a single assignment with the user's submission

post.summary: Submit or re-submit an assignment (multipart/form-data to include a file)

get.summary: Get all assignment submissions made by the authenticated user across all courses

200.description: List of submissions with assignment and course

post.summary: Register a new student account
Login and obtain Bearer token
Revoke the current Bearer token

get.summary: Get authenticated user profile with stats
List all active categories
Get a single category with its courses
List all categories with their published courses nested inside
Get featured courses grouped by category (public)
List courses belonging to a category with filters
Get top-level comments (with nested replies) for a lesson/topic

post.summary: Add a comment (or reply) to a lesson/topic

parent_id.description: ID of parent comment for replies

delete.summary: Delete a lesson comment and all its replies (owner only)

get.summary: Get top-level comments (with replies) for a whole course

post.summary: Add a comment (or reply) to a course

delete.summary: Delete a course comment and all its replies (owner only)

get.summary: List published courses with filters (public)
Get full course details (public)
Get courses recommended for the authenticated user based on enrollment history
List modules (with topics) for a course
Get detailed course information (description, requirements, instructors, etc.)
Get DIY (do-it-yourself) content for a course (enrollment required)
Get downloadable resources for a course (enrollment required)
Get today's personalised recommended courses (up to 10, cached 5 min)
Get the 10 most recently published courses
Get featured/highlighted courses (public; auth optional for enrollment status)
Get full course curriculum: modules, topics, tests, assignments, VR/DIY content
Get the authenticated user's completion percentage for a course
Get paginated reviews for a course

post.summary: Submit a review for a course (enrollment required, one review per user)

put.summary: Update the authenticated user's review for a course

delete.summary: Delete the authenticated user's review for a course

post.summary: Enroll in a course using an enrollment code

403.description: Code not valid for this account

get.summary: Get all enrollments for the authenticated user (minimal, for quick list)
Get the authenticated user's courses with progress, optionally filtered by status
Get courses with status=active for the authenticated user
Get courses with status=completed for the authenticated user
Get a specific enrollment with course details
Alias for /ongoing-courses
Get saved/bookmarked courses (via enrollment controller)
Get courses for which the authenticated user has certificates
Get facilitators in the authenticated user's location

200.description: Facilitators list (empty if user has no location)

get.summary: Get all active tutors and facilitators
List forum posts with optional search, category filter, and trending sort

post.summary: Create a new forum post (multipart/form-data to attach image)

get.summary: Get a forum post with its top-level comments

200.description: Forum post with comments and is_liked status

get.summary: List top-level comments for a forum post with is_liked status

post.summary: Add a comment (or nested reply) to a forum post
Toggle like on a forum post (like=true to like, like=false to unlike; defaults to toggle)

like.description: Explicit like value; omit to auto-toggle

200.description: Updated post with likes count and is_liked

post.summary: Increment share count on a forum post
Toggle like on a forum comment

200.description: Updated comment with likes count and is_liked

get.summary: Get messages for a course conversation (must be enrolled; or use course_id=0 for location-based facilitator messages)

schema.description: Course ID or 0 for location-based messaging

403.description: Not enrolled or course not found

post.summary: Send a message to a course instructor or location-based facilitator

course_id.description: Course ID or 0 for location-based messaging

403.description: Recipient not reachable (not instructor of course / wrong location)

get.summary: Get a single message (auto-marks as read if the user is the recipient)

put.summary: Mark a message as read (recipient only)

get.summary: Get module details with topics, tests, and per-topic progress

200.description: Module details with topics and tests

get.summary: Get all notes the authenticated user made for a course
Get all notes the authenticated user made for topics in a specific module

post.summary: Create a note for a specific topic at an optional video timestamp

get.summary: Get all notes for a specific topic/lesson

404.description: Module or topic not in course

get.summary: Get paginated notifications for the authenticated user
Get the number of unread notifications
Get a notification (auto-marks as read)
Get topic-level progress for a course (enrollment required)

post.summary: Mark a topic/lesson as 100% complete

403.description: Not enrolled in the course that owns this topic

put.summary: Update watch time and completion percentage for a progress record

post.summary: Mark a module quiz as completed and retrieve the test attempt result
Sync a single topic progress record (mobile app legacy endpoint)

get.summary: Get all courses saved/bookmarked by the authenticated user

post.summary: Bookmark/save a course

get.summary: Get the test for a module with questions and past attempts

200.description: Module test with questions and past attempts

404.description: No test found for this module

post.summary: Submit answers for a module test

201.description: Test submitted with score and pass/fail result

get.summary: Get the test for a specific topic/lesson with questions and past attempts

200.description: Topic test with questions and past attempts

404.description: No test found for this topic

post.summary: Submit answers for a topic/lesson test

201.description: Test submitted with score and pass/fail result
